name: clawdmeter-codex-sdk
description: Node sidecar for Clawdmeter Codex SDK observation mode

comments.dependency_strategy: The @openai/codex-sdk dep is intentionally NOT listed here so the repo's tree stays light. CodexSDKManager.provisionIfNeeded() runs `npm install @openai/codex-sdk` into ~/Library/Application Support/Clawdmeter/codex-sdk/ on first toggle ON — the install lives in the AppSupport dir, not in the repo. The sidecar's main.mjs detects whether the SDK is reachable via `await import('@openai/codex-sdk')` and falls back to skeleton mode when not.
